jcr:content.jcr:title: SpectraLink 7000 Series: Redefining In-Line Dimensional Measurement
jcr:content.jcr:description: Our new flagship CMM platform delivers 0.05 µm measurement uncertainty — certified for use in Class 10,000 cleanrooms.

title.title: SpectraLink 7000 Series: Redefining In-Line Dimensional Measurement

text.text:
The SpectraLink 7000 Series represents a fundamental leap in non-contact dimensional metrology. Engineered for demanding production environments — semiconductor fabs, precision machining centers, and medical device cleanrooms — these sensors deliver sub-micron repeatability at throughput rates previously achievable only in offline CMM suites. With an IP67-rated housing and operating temperature range of -10°C to +60°C, the 7000 Series is built for the factory floor, not the laboratory.

At the core of the system is Lumina’s fourth-generation Coherent Spectral Engine, which pairs a 1550 nm swept-source laser with a 24-bit ADC acquisition chain. The result is a measurement noise floor of ±0.08 μm RMS — a 40% improvement over the previous SpectraLink 5500 generation. Integrated machine-vision pre-screening allows the sensor to autonomously reject out-of-tolerance parts before they reach downstream assembly, dramatically reducing scrap costs for high-mix production lines.

pull_quote.name: Pull Quote
pull_quote.text: “For the first time, manufacturers can achieve CMM-grade accuracy at line speed — without sacrificing throughput or floor space. The SpectraLink 7000 eliminates the trade-off that has defined in-line metrology for two decades.”

text.text: The 7000 Series ships with LuminaLink SDK, a unified API layer supporting OPC-UA, EtherNet/IP, and MQTT — ensuring seamless integration with SCADA, MES, and Industry 4.0 data fabrics. A new adaptive calibration algorithm continuously compensates for thermal drift, eliminating the warm-up periods that slow production changeovers. Customers on the SpectraLink Assurance Plan gain access to remote diagnostics and predictive maintenance alerts via the Lumina Cloud dashboard.
